File: context\read_plan.py (139 lines total)
   1 | from __future__ import annotations
   2 | 
   3 | import json
   4 | from dataclasses import dataclass, field
   5 | from typing import Any
   6 | 
   7 | 
   8 | @dataclass(frozen=True)
   9 | class ReadPlanItem:
  10 |     path: str
  11 |     reason: str
  12 |     closes_gap: str
  13 |     priority: int
  14 |     max_ranges: int = 1
  15 | 
  16 |     def summary(self) -> str:
  17 |         range_word = "range" if self.max_ranges == 1 else "ranges"
  18 |         return f"{self.path} ({self.reason}; up to {self.max_ranges} {range_word})"
  19 | 
  20 | 
  21 | @dataclass
  22 | class ReadPlan:
  23 |     task_id: str
  24 |     subsystem: str
  25 |     items: list[ReadPlanItem]
  26 |     stop_condition: str
  27 |     approved: bool = False
  28 | 
  29 |     def allowed_paths(self) -> frozenset[str]:
  30 |         return frozenset(item.path for item in self.items if item.path)
  31 | 
  32 |     def item_for_path(self, path: str) -> ReadPlanItem | None:
  33 |         for item in self.items:
  34 |             if item.path == path:
  35 |                 return item
  36 |         return None
  37 | 
  38 |     def summary(self, max_items: int = 4) -> str:
  39 |         if not self.items:
  40 |             return "(no items)"
  41 |         pieces = [item.summary() for item in self.items[:max_items]]
  42 |         if len(self.items) > max_items:
  43 |             pieces.append(f"... and {len(self.items) - max_items} more")
  44 |         return "; ".join(pieces)
  45 | 
  46 | 
  47 | def _extract_json_object(text: str) -> dict:
  48 |     """Extract the first JSON object from text that may contain prose around it."""
  49 |     text = text.strip()
  50 |     # Try direct parse first
  51 |     try:
  52 |         payload = json.loads(text)
  53 |         if isinstance(payload, dict):
  54 |             return payload
  55 |     except json.JSONDecodeError:
  56 |         pass
  57 |     # Try json.loads starting from each '{' in the text
  58 |     search_start = 0
  59 |     while True:
  60 |         idx = text.find("{", search_start)
  61 |         if idx == -1:
  62 |             break
  63 |         try:
  64 |             decoder = json.JSONDecoder()
  65 |             payload, end = decoder.raw_decode(text, idx)
  66 |             if isinstance(payload, dict):
  67 |                 return payload
  68 |         except json.JSONDecodeError:
  69 |             pass
  70 |         search_start = idx + 1
  71 |     raise ValueError("no valid JSON object found in message")
  72 | 
  73 | 
  74 | def parse_read_plan_message(message: str, *, task_id: str) -> ReadPlan:
  75 |     payload = _extract_json_object(message)
  76 |     if not isinstance(payload, dict):
  77 |         raise ValueError("read plan payload must be a JSON object")
  78 | 
  79 |     raw_items = payload.get("items")
  80 |     if not isinstance(raw_items, list) or not raw_items:
  81 |         raise ValueError("read plan must include a non-empty items list")
  82 | 
  83 |     items: list[ReadPlanItem] = []
  84 |     for index, item in enumerate(raw_items, start=1):
  85 |         if not isinstance(item, dict):
  86 |             raise ValueError(f"read plan item {index} must be an object")
  87 |         path = str(item.get("path", "")).strip()
  88 |         reason = str(item.get("reason", "")).strip()
  89 |         closes_gap = str(item.get("closes_gap", "")).strip()
  90 |         priority = int(item.get("priority", index))
  91 |         max_ranges = int(item.get("max_ranges", 1))
  92 |         if not path:
  93 |             raise ValueError(f"read plan item {index} is missing path")
  94 |         if not reason:
  95 |             raise ValueError(f"read plan item {index} is missing reason")
  96 |         if not closes_gap:
  97 |             raise ValueError(f"read plan item {index} is missing closes_gap")
  98 |         items.append(
  99 |             ReadPlanItem(
 100 |                 path=path,
 101 |                 reason=reason,
 102 |                 closes_gap=closes_gap,
 103 |                 priority=priority,
 104 |                 max_ranges=max(1, max_ranges),
 105 |             )
 106 |         )
 107 | 
 108 |     subsystem = str(payload.get("subsystem", "")).strip() or "broad-analysis"
 109 |     stop_condition = str(payload.get("stop_condition", "")).strip()
 110 |     if not stop_condition:
 111 |         raise ValueError("read plan must include stop_condition")
 112 | 
 113 |     plan = ReadPlan(
 114 |         task_id=task_id,
 115 |         subsystem=subsystem,
 116 |         items=sorted(items, key=lambda item: (item.priority, item.path)),
 117 |         stop_condition=stop_condition,
 118 |         approved=True,
 119 |     )
 120 |     return plan
 121 | 
 122 | 
 123 | def read_plan_to_dict(plan: ReadPlan) -> dict[str, Any]:
 124 |     return {
 125 |         "task_id": plan.task_id,
 126 |         "subsystem": plan.subsystem,
 127 |         "items": [
 128 |             {
 129 |                 "path": item.path,
 130 |                 "reason": item.reason,
 131 |                 "closes_gap": item.closes_gap,
 132 |                 "priority": item.priority,
 133 |                 "max_ranges": item.max_ranges,
 134 |             }
 135 |             for item in plan.items
 136 |         ],
 137 |         "stop_condition": plan.stop_condition,
 138 |         "approved": plan.approved,
 139 |     }
